name: Oatmeal Carmelitas
recipeIngredient: 1 package semisweet chocolate chips, 6 oz size
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt caramels in cream over the top of a double boiler.
2. Cool slightly and set aside.
3. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup; level off.
4. Combine flour with remaining ingredients except chocolate chips and pecans.
5. Press half of the crumbs into the bottom of an ungreased 11x7-inch or 9 inch square pan.
6. Bake for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven.
7. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and pecans.
8. Spread carefully with caramel mixture.
9. Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
10. Chill for 1-2 hours.
11. Cut into bars.
